creator: davidjones64619@gmail.com
text:
You can either get an answer to your query in the community forum of Microsoft 365. Or you can also submit your service request. For Office 365 help, do the following.
Login to Microsoft 365 and tap ‘Support.’
Now choose ‘New service request.’
You can also call the toll free number for seeking support.

https://www.emailsupport.us/microsoft-office-365-support
